title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入墨西哥：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入墨西哥：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Mexico NOM electrical safety, NYCE/ANCE certification, CRE/CFE grid interconnection, CONUEE efficiency, and import expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与墨西哥 NOM 电气安全、NYCE/ANCE 认证、CRE/CFE 并网、CONUEE 能效及进口要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與墨西哥 NOM 電氣安全、NYCE/ANCE 認證、CRE/CFE 併網、CONUEE 能效及進口要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, grid-interconnection approval, CFE acceptance, CRE permit decision, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current NOM, certification-body, customs, energy-efficiency, grid-code, installation, and project-permit requirements with qualified Mexican professionals before shipment, sale, interconnection, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、并网批准、CFE 接受、CRE 许可决定或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货、销售、并网或安装前，应与合格的墨西哥专业人士核验现行 NOM、认证机构、海关、能效、电网规范、安装及项目许可要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、併網批准、CFE 接受、CRE 許可決定或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨、銷售、併網或安裝前，應與合格的墨西哥專業人士核驗現行 NOM、認證機構、海關、能效、電網規範、安裝及項目許可要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made BESS entering Mexico, the practical baseline is NOM electrical safety and installation compliance: NOM-003-SCFI for in-scope electrical products, NOM-001-SEDE for installations, certification through an accredited body such as NYCE or ANCE where required, and separate CRE/CFE grid-interconnection review for storage projects.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造 BESS 进入墨西哥时，实务基线是 NOM 电气安全和安装合规：适用电气产品须满足 NOM-003-SCFI，安装须满足 NOM-001-SEDE，必要时通过 NYCE 或 ANCE 等认可机构认证，并对储能项目另行完成 CRE/CFE 并网审查。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造 BESS 進入墨西哥時，實務基線是 NOM 電氣安全和安裝合規：適用電氣產品須滿足 NOM-003-SCFI，安裝須滿足 NOM-001-SEDE，必要時通過 NYCE 或 ANCE 等認可機構認證，並對儲能項目另行完成 CRE/CFE 併網審查。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, certification body, customs, energy authority, grid operator, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
